Landing evidence (satisfies the Gerrit-vote acceptance criterion):
- Gerrit change 506: https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/506
- LLM-Review +1 (rebar review bot): 'LLM-Review: PASS — rebar code review passed'.
- Verified +1 (rebar CI bot): SUCCESS — https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29119358745
- Patch set 2 rebased onto origin/main tip (Fast-Forward-Only, ADR-0040); LLM-Review carried across the trivial rebase, Verified re-run green.
- Submitted via POST /a/changes/506/submit as RebarBotNava -> status MERGED (2026-07-10 20:29:41Z).
- Merge commit on origin/main: dc032d11b 'docs(examples): add example Claude Code skills for rebar workflows'.
All other AC (artifacts exist under examples/claude-skills/; no personal/host/path leakage; rebar-implement defers to project docs) are satisfied by the merged content.
